Privacy PolicyPrivacy PolicyPaintEvery now and then one paints a picture that seems to have opened a door and serves as a stepping stone to other things.This is perfect app who loves painting. This is very simple and useful for all age groups. You can simply draw's the painting and have fun with your photos.👉It also supports to share your creations on popular social networks such as Facebook, Twitter, WhatApp, Instagram and more with friends and family members.

👉This is extremely useful to Kids and students. They can simply draw's letters, digits, pets drawing and share with their parents or teacher as a study part.👉With Paint app user have full control of brush color, brush size, background color of drawing area.User can draw some texts on photos picked up from Gallery or captured from Camera and send it to anybody. Useful to send someone Birthday, Anniversary, Festival wishes.👉

Features:• Create new drawing• User can draw stickers and texts while painting• User can draw emojis• Edit existing drawing• Pick up image from Gallery or from Camera and draw painting on it.• Undo and Redo for drawing• Eraser• Saves drawing• Share your drawingPrivacy PolicyTejaswini Kote built the Paint app as an Ad Supported app. This SERVICE is provided by Tejaswini Kote at no cost and is intended for use as is.

What information we collect?I want to inform you that we do not collect any user information from application and do not publish any data to our server.
